title: [PrepareForEmission] PrepareForEmission doesn't handle variadic operations in presence of `twoState` flags
body:
```mlir
hw.module @Foo(%a: i1, %b: i1, %c: i1) -> (d:i1){
  %0 = comb.or bin %a, %b, %c: i1
  hw.output %0:i1
}
```

`$ circt-opt -export-verilog` crashes because PrepareForEmissoin doesn't decompose variadic comb.or operations into binary op.
